usage: verifyPowerVia [-help] [-append] [-area {x1 y1 x2 y2}] [-checkWirePinOverlap] [-edgeToEdge] [-error <integer>] [-exclude_region_file <string>] [-fill] [-hookup_pitch <integer>] [-ignore_objects {drc_fill io_wire}] [-ignore_partial_overlap <string>] [-layerRange <string>] [-layer_rail <string>] [-layer_stripe <string>] [-pitch <integer>] [-report <string>] [-search_range {x y}] [-shielding] [-stackedVia] [-stripe_rule <float>] [-viaUtil <float>] [-what_if_report <string>] [-widthRange <string>] [ -net <string> | -selected ] [-nonOrthogonalCheck [-distance {x y}]]

options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -append
options.description: specifies that all previous verifyPowerVia settings will be kept

options.name: -area
options.description: specifies the area to check

options.name: -checkWirePinOverlap
options.description: specifies the overlap of wire and pin to be checked

options.name: -distance
options.description: specifies distances (x, y) (center-to-center) for non-orthogonal check

options.name: -edgeToEdge
options.description: specifies to check non-orthogonal distance by edge-to-edge

options.name: -error
options.description: Specifies the maximum number of errors to report

options.name: -exclude_region_file
options.description: Specifies the file to ignore missing VIA check within these regions in cell.

options.name: -fill
options.description: Specifies that metal fill should also be checked

options.name: -hookup_pitch
options.description: specifies the hookup pitch

options.name: -ignore_objects
options.description: specifies the wire type to no check

options.name: -ignore_partial_overlap
options.description: Specifies that partially overlap metals need to be check for missing vias.

options.name: -layerRange
options.description: Specifies the top and bottom metal layers to consider

options.name: -layer_rail
options.description: specifies the power rail layer for checking

options.name: -layer_stripe
options.description: specifies the stripe layer list for checking

options.name: -net
options.description: The name of power nets that will be checked

options.name: -nonOrthogonalCheck
options.description: specifies non othogonal checks for wire and wire intersection

options.name: -pitch
options.description: specifies the pitch

options.name: -report
options.description: Specifies the report file for verifyPowerVia violations data

options.name: -search_range
options.description: specifies a rectangle area with XY, a valid connection should be in the specified area

options.name: -selected
options.description: Specifies whether to check between selected objects

options.name: -shielding
options.description: specifies to check shielding wire

options.name: -stackedVia
options.description: specifies to check missing vias between all non-adjacent layers as well as adjacent layers

options.name: -stripe_rule
options.description: specifies the distance for power via center-to-center spacing checking

options.name: -viaUtil
options.description: specifies the ratio of cutArea/metal intersection area. If the actual ratio is less than specified ratio, mark it as violation.

options.name: -what_if_report
options.description: Specifies the what_if report file for verifyPowerVia violations data. power rail analysis command could read in the report file and do power rail analysis.

options.name: -widthRange
options.description: specifies metal width to consider
